title: First-Line Supervisors of Food Preparation and Serving Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of workers engaged in preparing and serving food.

tasks.text: Resolve customer complaints regarding food service.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train workers in food preparation, and in service, sanitation, and safety procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assign duties, responsibilities, and work stations to employees in accordance with work requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Present bills and accept payments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform various financial activities, such as cash handling, deposit preparation, and payroll.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise and participate in kitchen and dining area cleaning activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend measures for improving work procedures and worker performance to increase service quality and enhance job safety.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Specify food portions and courses, production and time sequences, and workstation and equipment arrangements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Control inventories of food, equipment, smallware, and liquor, and report shortages to designated personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and evaluate workers and work procedures to ensure quality standards and service, and complete disciplinary write-ups.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze operational problems, such as theft and wastage, and establish procedures to alleviate these problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect supplies, equipment, and work areas to ensure efficient service and conformance to standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Greet and seat guests, and present menus and wine lists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate new products for usefulness and suitability.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Compile and balance cash receipts at the end of the day or shift.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Forecast staff, equipment, and supply requirements, based on a master menu.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess nutritional needs of patients, plan special menus, supervise the assembly of regular and special diet trays, and oversee the delivery of food trolleys to hospital patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record production, operational, and personnel data on specified forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Perform personnel actions, such as hiring and firing staff, providing employee orientation and training, and conducting supervisory activities, such as creating work schedules or organizing employee time sheets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate ingredients and supplies required to prepare a recipe.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Purchase or requisition supplies and equipment needed to ensure quality and timely delivery of services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform food preparation and serving duties, such as carving meat, preparing flambe dishes, or serving wine and liquor.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule parties and take reservations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop departmental objectives, budgets, policies, procedures, and strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct meetings and collaborate with other personnel for menu planning, serving arrangements, and related details.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop equipment maintenance schedules and arrange for repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
